hero.title: I'm Aurel VEHI
hero.subtitle: Data Analyst, Data Scientist, and Economic Analyst
hero.description: I design analytical workflows that turn complex datasets into clear insights, practical tools, and decision-ready outputs.

about.description1: I work at the intersection of econometrics and data science, building rigorous analyses, extracting useful insights, and producing clear, actionable results.
about.description2: I am able to cover the full analytical workflow, from data collection to final delivery, across various application domains (economics, environment, energy...). My research background has given me strong methodological rigor and the ability to work independently on demanding projects.
about.description3: Feel free to contact me for any collaboration or professional opportunity!

skills.title: Skills, expertise, and technologies
skills.description: My background combines advanced quantitative methods, hands-on project experience, and certifications that validate my command of the tools I use.

tools.python: Data cleaning, EDA, data analysis, machine learning, deep learning
tools.stata: Applied econometrics, statistical analysis, academic workflows
tools.julia: Scientific computing, numerical methods, data workflows
tools.mysql: SQL queries, relational databases, data extraction
tools.postgresql: Database design, querying, analytics-ready data models
tools.mongodb: Document databases, flexible storage, NoSQL workflows
tools.tensorflow: Deep learning, neural networks, model prototyping
tools.fastapi: API development, model serving, backend endpoints
tools.vscode: Code editing, debugging, project workflow management
tools.html: Semantic page structure and web content layout
tools.javascript: Frontend interactivity, UI logic, dynamic behavior
tools.react: Component-based UI development, state management, performance optimization
tools.streamlit: Interactive data apps and fast analytical interfaces
tools.googlecloud: Cloud services, deployment, and data-related tooling
